error.signature: CocoaPods could not find compatible versions for pod 'Firebase/CoreOnly'
error.regex: (CocoaPods could not find compatible versions|pod install.*error|Specs satisfying.*were found but|CDN.*error.*trunk|Podfile\.lock.*out of date)

verdict.summary: iOS dependency conflict. Plugin versions require incompatible native library versions.

dead_ends.action: Delete Podfile.lock and Pods directory and re-run
dead_ends.why_fails: Removing Podfile.lock loses version pins. May install breaking changes in transitive dependencies.

dead_ends.action: Pin all pod versions to exact numbers
dead_ends.why_fails: Exact version pins prevent security updates and conflict with Flutter plugin requirements

workarounds.action: Update CocoaPods repo and re-run pod install
workarounds.how: cd ios && pod repo update && pod install

workarounds.action: Run flutter clean then rebuild iOS
workarounds.how: flutter clean && cd ios && rm -rf Pods Podfile.lock && cd .. && flutter pub get && cd ios && pod install

workarounds.action: Check Flutter plugin compatibility matrix and update pubspec.yaml
